name: stories-with-ttl
description: Instagram/Snapchat-style ephemeral stories with configurable TTL (default 24h) and on-disk archival when expired.

envVars.name: STORY_TTL_HOURS
envVars.description: Hours before a story is archived. Default 24.

postInstall: 1. Run the DB migration to create the stories table
2. Mount StoryBar on the top of your feed and pass currentUserId
3. Schedule an archive job that moves expired stories to <profile>/stories/_expired/ — see elite-archive-expired-stories.py in the transcoder-pipeline module
